description: Enforce tool usage policies, synthetic tool dispatch, and destructive action confirmation for Prismatic integration building

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use the search script instead: prismatic-tools find-components <keyword>"}}' >&2 && exit 2
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Testing executes a flow which may trigger real side effects (sending messages, creating records)."}}'
